THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB COMPANY DBA ARROW CAB COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, XI TAO $10,924.15 PRINCIPAL, $1,638.62 INTEREST, $726.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,289.27, * INTEREST ACCRUED AT A RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM FROM AUGUST 6,2004 TO FEBRUARY 6, 2006. IT IS FURTHER ADJUDGED THAT THE CROSS-COMPLAINT OF PROGRESSIVE INSURANCE COMPANY BE DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. STATUTORY COSTS PERTAINING TO THE CROSS-COMPLAINT ARE AWARDED TO CROSS-DEFENDANTS SPECK CAB COMPANY, DBA ARROW CAB COMPANY AND BADIE TAVATI, PER COSTS BILL. SEE SCANNED DOC- LAF, D210.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
